name: kismet-capture-nxp-kw41z
title: kismet-capture-nxp-kw41z
summary: Kismet NXP KW41Z BTLE and Zigbee Sniffer capture helper
description:
Kismet NXP KW41Z BTLE and Zigbee Sniffer capture helper
Kismet is a wireless network and device detector, sniffer, wardriving tool,
and WIDS (wireless intrusion detection) framework.
.
Kismet works with Wi-Fi interfaces, Bluetooth interfaces, some SDR (software
defined radio) hardware like the RTLSDR, and other specialized capture
hardware.
.
This package contains the Kismet NXP KW41Z BTLE and Zigbee Sniffer capture
helper.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use kismet_cap_nxp_kw41z because Kismet NXP KW41Z BTLE and Zigbee Sniffer capture helper.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use kismet_cap_nxp_kw41z as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `kismet_cap_nxp_kw41z [options] [args]` as documented upstream for kismet_cap_nxp_kw41z.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair kismet_cap_nxp_kw41z with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `kismet_cap_nxp_kw41z --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
